text: We are going to give the park a new look.
blank: give the park a new look
chinese: 我们打算给公园一个新面貌。

text: Have you finished your work?
chinese: 你完成你的工作了吗？

text: Yes, we've painted the fence.
chinese: 是的，我们已经给栅栏刷好漆了。

text: I've broken a flowerpot.
chinese: 我打碎了一个花盆。

text: Tom has drawn the signs.
chinese: 汤姆已经画好了标志。

text: Have you made the beds yet?
chinese: 你整理好床铺了吗？

text: Yes, we've made the beds already.
chinese: 是的，我们已经整理好床铺了。

text: Have you tidied the rooms yet?
chinese: 你打扫好房间了吗？

text: Yes, we've just tidied the rooms.
chinese: 是的，我们刚打扫好房间。

text: Have you swept the floor yet?
chinese: 你扫过地了吗？

text: No, we haven't swept the floor yet.
chinese: 不，我们还没有扫地。

text: How many times have you given flowers to a pop star?
chinese: 你给流行明星送过几次花？

text: I've given flowers to a pop star once only.
chinese: 我只给流行明星送过一次花。

text: How many times have you had snake soup?
chinese: 你喝过几次蛇汤？

text: I've had snake soup twice.
chinese: 我喝过两次蛇汤。

text: Have you ever visited West Lake?
chinese: 你去过西湖吗？

text: No, I've never visited West Lake.
chinese: 不，我从没去过西湖。

text: Have you ever watched a parade? Yes, I have.
chinese: 你看过游行吗？看过。

text: Have you ever met a famous person? No, I haven't.
chinese: 你见过名人吗？没见过。

text: What are you having for lunch today, children?
chinese: 孩子们，今天午饭你们吃什么？

text: I'm having a few peas, some bread and a lot of chicken.
chinese: 我吃一点豌豆、一些面包和很多鸡肉。

text: I'm having a little pork, some broccoli and a lot of noodles.
chinese: 我吃一点猪肉、一些西兰花和很多面条。

text: On Wednesday he had some bread for breakfast.
chinese: 周三他早餐吃了一些面包。

text: He had less broccoli on Tuesday than on Monday.
chinese: 他周二吃的西兰花比周一少。

text: He had more sausages on Tuesday than on Monday.
chinese: 他周二吃的香肠比周一多。

text: He had fewer grapes.
chinese: 他吃的葡萄更少了。

text: What are you having for breakfast today?
chinese: 你今天早餐吃什么？

text: I'm having some bread, a little milk and a lot of grapes.
chinese: 我吃一些面包、一点牛奶和很多葡萄。

text: He has to eat more fruits than before.
chinese: 他得比以前吃更多水果。

text: He should drink less milk than before.
chinese: 他应该比以前少喝牛奶。

text: He should have fewer peas instead.
chinese: 他应该改吃更少的豌豆。

text: Would you like some snacks?
chinese: 你想来点零食吗？

text: I have a few crackers and some yoghurt.
chinese: 我有一点饼干和一些酸奶。

text: I have a lot of chocolate and potato chips.
chinese: 我有很多巧克力和薯片。

text: It's OK to eat a little sweet corn and some steamed buns.
chinese: 吃一点甜玉米和一些包子是可以的。

text: You shouldn't eat too much ice cream.
chinese: 你不应该吃太多冰淇淋。

text: You shouldn't eat too many cookies either.
chinese: 你也不应该吃太多饼干。

text: What should we eat to have a balanced diet?
chinese: 我们应该吃什么来保持均衡饮食？

text: We should eat plenty of vegetables every day.
chinese: 我们应该每天吃大量的蔬菜。

text: We shouldn't eat too much fried food.
chinese: 我们不应该吃太多油炸食品。

text: It's OK to eat a lot of fruit and vegetables.
chinese: 吃大量水果和蔬菜是可以的。

text: Let's go to Qingpu District.
chinese: 我们去青浦区吧。

text: We can pick fruit there.
chinese: 我们可以在那里摘水果。

text: We can get there by school bus.
chinese: 我们可以坐校车去。

text: It takes about one hour and ten minutes.
chinese: 大约需要一小时十分钟。

text: How far is it from school?
chinese: 离学校有多远？
